---
title: "Day 2. Mini Hackathon"
subtitle: "13 May 2026"
toc: false
---

Participants work on their own research questions supported by the workshop
team. Bring your own data if possible. The full Day 1 material remains
available as reference.

## Format

Free-form project work in small groups. We provide assistance with:

- Adapting TVB-O model specifications to your own data
- Running TVB-Optim fitting on custom parameter spaces
- Debugging and interpreting simulation results
- Connecting your models to EBRAINS infrastructure

## Reference material from Day 1

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Day 1 overview](day1.qmd)
All chapters and notebooks from the structured sessions.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Agenda](../agenda/agenda.qmd)
Full workshop program with references.
:::

:::

## What you need

- Completion of Day 1 sessions (or equivalent background)
- An [EBRAINS](https://ebrains.eu) account to run the notebooks online, or a
  local Python environment set up via `uv sync`
